attributes.action: Bus lane fairness - making bus lanes more clear and making penalties fairer
attributes.background: Bus lanes need to be more visible for the drivers on the road, many unfair fines are given to people for faulty road signals. By introducing a new indicator for where bus lanes are, people will not disobey road laws and less people will have heavy fines to pay in the already heavy economy.

rejection.details: You could start a new petition setting out more clearly what you mean by a "new indicator".
